label: hold_create_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → @radix-ui/react-dialog Dialog with fixed max-width and overlay
Local useState per field → useForm (react-hook-form) + zodResolver; schema validates reference FK existence server-side
QA_HOLD_REASONS mock array → Drizzle query from hold_reason_codes reference table in Server Component loader
reasonNotesRequired conditional → Zod .superRefine with cross-field validation on reason_notes min-10 rule
Priority pills + isCritical banner → shadcn RadioGroup or ToggleGroup; alert box → shadcn Alert variant='warning'
disposition/estRelease fields → shadcn Select + shadcn DatePicker (react-day-picker)
Add Server Action with role guard (quality_inspector or quality_lead); emit quality_hold_created outbox event on success
Hardcoded labels ('LP', 'Batch', etc.) → next-intl t() keys; SoD warning copy → i18n key with V-QA-HOLD-006 ref
known_bugs: BL-QA-07 — real-time spec search autocomplete for hold reference picker not implemented

label: hold_release_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → @radix-ui/react-dialog Dialog; destructive action pattern needs red-bordered footer per MODAL-SCHEMA §4
sodBlock guard → server-side RBAC check comparing hold.created_by_user_id to session.userId; never trust client-only block
PIN masked input → virtual keypad component (BL-QA-06 notes plain input is inadequate; use on-screen digit buttons to defeat keyloggers)
SHA-256 hash reference → server generates signature_hash server-side on POST; client never computes it
Add Server Action with disposition != 'Pending' Zod check and SoD database assertion before commit
Emit quality_hold_released outbox event; immutable audit record inserted by DB trigger, not client
Summary component → shadcn dl/dt/dd pattern or Table with two columns; no separate primitive needed
Hardcoded user name/timestamp → server-injected from session and server clock; never trust client datetime
known_bugs: BL-QA-06 — plain masked PIN input; virtual keypad deferred

label: spec_sign_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → @radix-ui/react-dialog Dialog; checklist items → shadcn Checkbox list, disabled/read-only (server-computed pre-approval checks)
checks[] hardcoded → Server Action pre-flight: query DB to verify V-QA-SPEC-002 (all params have test_method), V-QA-SPEC-003 (min<=target<=max), V-QA-SPEC-005 (role=quality_lead)
PIN esign-block → shared ESignBlock server component; PIN verified via PBKDF2 match against stored user PIN hash
Allergen profile snapshot note → on approve Server Action: read allergen_profile from 03-Technical and snapshot JSON into spec record
Add immutability: after approval, spec status changes to 'active' and all fields locked; UI transitions to read-only SignedBanner
Hardcoded spec meta (product, version) → props from parent loader; no local state for read-only summary data
known_bugs: BL-QA-06 — plain PIN input; virtual keypad deferred

label: template_create_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal size='wide' → Dialog with wider max-width class; wide pattern needs explicit className override on DialogContent
Inline editable params table (add/remove rows) → react-hook-form useFieldArray for dynamic parameter list
params local state → useFieldArray; each row maps to { name, type } with shadcn Input and Badge for type display
Mock category select → reference data from inspection_template_categories table; load server-side as static prop
Save Template → Server Action upsert to inspection_templates; validate at least 1 param present (paramsValid)
Delete row button → useFieldArray remove(i); no server call until Save

label: sample_draw_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → Dialog; AQL plan summary Summary rows → shadcn DescriptionList or read-only dl/dt/dd grid
AQL decision computed client-side (defects vs accept/reject) → mirror same logic server-side in Server Action; client preview only
defects state + decision alert → live Zod validation with watch() on defects field; conditional Alert variant green/amber/red
'NCR will be auto-created' banner → Server Action must trigger ncr_reports INSERT when decision='reject'; not a client concern
Sampling plan (plan.sampleSize, plan.accept, plan.reject) → loaded from sampling_plans table joined to inspection; never hardcoded
remaining = plan.sampleSize - insp.samplesTaken → computed server-side and passed as prop; input max attribute set from prop

label: ncr_create_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal size='wide' → Dialog with wide variant; dual-path conditional blocks (yield_issue / allergen_deviation) → useWatch on type field
Local useState per field → useForm + zodResolver with superRefine cross-path validation (allergenLink required if type=allergen_deviation)

yield details block → conditionally rendered FormSection; targetYield/actualYield/claim% → number inputs; claimValue = (targetYield - actualYield) / targetYield * affectedQty * price (server-computed)
Product/assignedTo selects → server-loaded option lists; product search should be autocomplete/combobox not plain select for large catalogs
Save as draft / Submit NCR → two Server Actions (saveDraft, submitNcr); submitNcr validates description.length >= 20 server-side
dueMap severity→hours → stored as rule V-QA-NCR-001 in rules registry; read from DB, not hardcoded in UI
Emit ncr_created outbox event on submit; auto-create hold if type=allergen_deviation per V-QA-NCR-004

label: ncr_close_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → Dialog; dual-sign layout (isCritical grid 1fr 1fr) → two ESignBlock components conditionally rendered
Pre-close checklist (checks[]) → server-side pre-flight in Server Action: query rootCause, immediateAction, linked holds status; fail = 422 with error details
V-QA-NCR-006 dual sign → Server Action enforces: critical NCRs require two distinct user_id values (qa_pin user + pm_pin user); not client-validated
rootCauseCategory select → reference data from ncr_root_cause_categories table
On close: status → 'closed', closedAt = server timestamp, signature_hash stored; record becomes immutable (row-level trigger)
Emit ncr_closed outbox event; any linked holds auto-updated if disposition still 'Pending'
Both PIN blocks → shared ESignBlock component with user context prop; second signer PIN must be a different session user (Production Manager)
known_bugs: BL-QA-06 — plain PIN input; virtual keypad deferred

label: ccp_reading_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → Dialog; CCP select with optgroup → shadcn Select or Combobox grouped by HACCP plan
withinLimits/outOfLimits real-time computation → useWatch on value field + server-fetched ccpDef limits; never trust client-only limit check
Alert color conditional (green/red) → shadcn Alert with variant prop driven by server-validated result from Server Action preview endpoint
hazardSignRequired (biological/allergen) → e-sign block conditionally rendered; PIN verified server-side via PBKDF2; V-QA-CCP-005
Auto-create NCR + auto-hold on out-of-limits → Server Action side-effect: if !withinLimits → INSERT ncr_reports draft + INSERT quality_holds
Measured value + unit display → load ccpDef from ccp_definitions table in Server Component; pass as prop to client modal
WO link optional field → FK check against work_orders; async validation on blur preferred

label: ccp_deviation_log_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → Dialog; CCP select → shadcn Select; severity override auto-computed from hazard_type → server-side derived field, not client select
corrective action ReasonInput (min 10) → Textarea + Zod min(10) validation with character counter
Linked monitoring record → FK search to ccp_monitoring_records; implement as async Combobox with debounced search
signReq (biological/allergen) → e-sign block conditional; add Server Action guard matching same rule as ccp_reading_modal
Auto-severity mapping (biological/allergen→critical, chemical/physical→major) → DB rule, not hardcoded enum in UI
Emit ccp_deviation_logged outbox event; link to related ccp_monitoring_record if provided

label: esign_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal size='sm' → Dialog with sm variant; generic e-sign primitive shared across all signing flows in quality module
Verify PIN button with simulated 700ms delay → real Server Action POST /api/auth/verify-pin returns {valid: bool}; use optimistic UI with loading spinner
PIN verification state (verified) → server response drives enabled state of Sign button; do not allow Sign without server confirmation
meaning prop → drives audit log signature_meaning field; never computed client-side; passed from parent action context
SHA-256 hash note → server computes hash(user_id || iso_timestamp || record_content); stored in esignatures table; client never touches hash
BL-QA-06 — replace plain <input type='password'> with virtual numeric keypad to defeat keyloggers (medium priority)
known_bugs: BL-QA-06 — plain PIN input; virtual keypad deferred (medium priority)

label: allergen_dual_sign_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → Dialog; ATP gate check (atpRlu > atpThreshold) → server pre-flight: query allergen_changeover_validations.atp_rlu; block flag returned to client
approveBlocked ATP override checkbox + justification → Zod conditional superRefine: override requires overrideJust.length >= 10; override event is audit-logged separately
First signer displayed (recorded) → read-only from DB; second signer PIN → ESignBlock with Quality Lead role guard
Reject gate button → separate Server Action setting status='rejected' with reject_reason; also audit-logged
EU FIC 1169/2011 + Reg 2021/382 reference → regulation tags stored per gate record in DB; display from data not hardcoded
Allergen delta display (removed/added) → computed from gate record's allergens_removed[] / allergens_added[] JSON arrays in DB
Emit allergen_gate_approved or allergen_gate_rejected outbox event; blocked approval emits allergen_gate_override_approved with justification

label: audit_export_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → Dialog; async prepare button with 1.2s mock delay → real streaming export via Next.js Route Handler (GET /api/quality/audit/export) with chunked response
Format pills (CSV/JSON) → shadcn RadioGroup or ToggleGroup; format drives Accept header on export request
Scope/user selects → filter params forwarded to Drizzle query on quality_audit_log; validate date range server-side (max 365d range)
Export-is-itself-an-audit-event note → Server Action or Route Handler inserts audit record for the export operation before streaming data
Download link on ready state → presigned S3/R2 URL or direct attachment response; never embed raw data in JSON response body for large exports
BRCGS Issue 10 §3.11.1 reference → regulatory tag from DB config, not hardcoded string

label: delete_with_reason_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal size='sm' → Dialog sm; destructive pattern: Delete button uses shadcn Button variant='destructive'
Reason min 10 chars → Zod min(10) + character counter; reason stored in audit log before DELETE
Server Action: validate entity is in a deletable state (draft-only for NCR per V-QA-NCR-005); active/signed records must reject with 409
Audit trail INSERT before DELETE → DB trigger or explicit Server Action step; reason_for_deletion stored in quality_audit_log.notes
entity/id props → typed discriminated union prop to support multiple deletable entity types (NCR, draft inspection, draft spec)

label: inspection_assign_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → Dialog default size; inspector select → load from users table filtered by role IN ('quality_inspector','quality_lead') in Server Component
Summary rows → read-only dl/dt/dd or shadcn Card with key-value pairs; inspection data passed as prop from parent list row
Priority override select → Server Action updates quality_inspections.priority; emit inspection_assigned outbox event
Notes textarea → stored in inspection record notes field; optional, no min length
Assign button → Server Action sets assigned_to_user_id and status='assigned'; validation: inspector must exist and have QA role

label: qa_dashboard
translation_notes: QA_KPIS mock array → Server Component: parallel Drizzle queries for open holds count, open NCRs count, overdue inspections, CCP compliance %; use Promise.all
KPI row (6 cards) → reusable KpiCard server component (label, value, sub, accent variant, onClick nav); 6-col CSS grid
Critical Alerts panel → server query: quality_alerts view or materialized view joining holds+NCRs+CCPs where severity='critical' and NOT dismissed; dismiss state stored per user in user_preferences
Dismissed set (local useState) → per-user dismissed_alerts stored in DB; dismiss action = Server Action updating user_dismissed_alerts
Tabbed recent records (Inspections/NCRs/HACCP) → shadcn Tabs + server-fetched data per tab; lazy-load tab content with Suspense
Auto-refresh (60s) note → implement via Next.js revalidate tag or client-side SWR with 60s interval; avoid polling in production
Quick actions bar → always-visible sticky footer buttons; openModal calls → URL-based modal state (searchParams) preferred over prop drilling
Role-based tab/action visibility → read role from session in Server Component; conditionally render tabs and action buttons

label: ncr_list
translation_notes: Client-side filter (status/severity/type/search) → URL searchParams driven; Server Component receives params and passes to Drizzle WHERE clause
Kanban-strip (draft/open/investigating/closed counts) → server aggregation query GROUP BY status; click filters the table via router.push with searchParam
Bulk selection (selected Set) → client state only for UI; bulk export → Server Action or Route Handler streaming CSV; bulk assign → Server Action with array of NCR IDs
Overdue highlight (row-overdue class) → computed server-side: response_due_at < now(); pass as row prop; CSS class applied conditionally
KPI row (4 cards) → same server query as kanban strip; combine into single aggregation query with COUNT FILTER
Pagination → implement cursor-based pagination with shadcn pagination; server query uses LIMIT/OFFSET or keyset pagination
Export button → Route Handler GET /api/quality/ncr/export with same filter params; streams CSV
Hardcoded 'Avg resolution 2.8d' → server AVG(closed_at - detected_at) WHERE closed_at IS NOT NULL in rolling 30d window

label: ncr_detail
translation_notes: Two-column layout (main + sidebar) → CSS grid 1fr 380px; sticky action bar at bottom → shadcn sticky footer pattern with safe-area-inset
Root cause textarea (editable when not closed) → optimistic local mutation + Server Action autosave on blur; field locked when isClosed
Pre-close checklist in modal (checks[]) → server pre-flight; but NCR detail also shows investigation state → linked holds status needs live query
CAPA section P2 placeholder → shadcn Card with opacity-50 + disabled overlay; link to future CAPA module (Epic 8G per BL-QA-01)
Activity timeline → q-timeline → shadcn Timeline or custom ul with dot indicators; events from ncr_events table ordered by created_at DESC
Linked records sidebar (hold/inspection/CCP deviation/complaint) → FK lookups; each link navigates to respective detail page
Status workflow sidebar → server-driven state machine; Next/Close buttons trigger Server Actions mapped to state transitions
SignedBanner (immutable record) → shadcn Alert variant='success' with lock icon; shown when status='closed'

label: incoming_inspection_list
translation_notes: Status tabs (all/pending/assigned/in_progress/completed/cancelled) → shadcn Tabs backed by URL searchParam; each tab count from server aggregation
Client filter (status/assigned/priority/date) → URL searchParams; Server Component passes to Drizzle WHERE clause with AND chaining
Overdue warning banner → server query: count WHERE urgency='overdue' AND status NOT IN ('completed','cancelled'); shown conditionally
Row actions (Assign/Start/View) → inline buttons; Assign opens inspection_assign_modal; Start navigates to detail; View links to detail
GRN/PO dual display in cell → two-line cell layout; GRN is FK to grn_receipts table; PO is FK to purchase_orders
Sampling plan column → join to sampling_plans table; display plan code
Export button → Route Handler streaming CSV with same filter params
Pagination → cursor-based with LIMIT; table likely large in production

label: inspection_detail
translation_notes: Measurements table with inline numeric inputs → react-hook-form useFieldArray; auto-result computation (pass/fail/pending) on value change via useWatch + Zod transform
updateMeasured with result auto-computation → server-side result validation: pass if min<=value<=max per spec parameter; client preview only
Overall result banner (overallResult: pass/fail/cond/pending) → derived from server response after submit; client shows optimistic preview
Fail reason block (conditional) → shadcn Select for reason code + Textarea for notes; V-QA-INSP-006 validation server-side
Auto-NCR creation banner → note to user; actual NCR INSERT happens in Server Action on submit (not client-side)
Right sidebar (GRN/Product/Spec/SamplingPlan/LPs) → Server Component data loaded once; no client state; FK joins to grn_receipts, products, specs, sampling_plans, lps
Action bar submit buttons (pass/fail/cond) → each triggers openModal('eSign') with meaning prop; after e-sign confirmation, Server Action finalizes inspection
Signed banner (isSigned) → show when inspection.signed_at IS NOT NULL; record locked; action bar hidden

label: holds_list
translation_notes: Status tabs (active/all/open/investigating/released/quarantined) → shadcn Tabs with URL searchParam; active tab = composite filter activeStates
Client-side filter (priority/refType/search) → URL searchParams to Server Component; Drizzle WHERE with AND chaining
Bulk selection (selected Set) → client-only for UI; bulk release → Server Action array; RBAC: only quality_lead role can release
KPI strip (open/investigating/avgAge/releasedToday) → single aggregation query with multiple COUNT/AVG expressions
overdue detection (estRelease < today AND active) → computed server-side; pass as boolean prop per row
Release button inline → opens hold_release_modal with row data; RBAC check: canRelease = role=quality_lead from session
Empty state with CTA → shadcn empty state pattern with illustration; 'Create Hold' button links to hold_create_modal
Export CSV → Route Handler with same filter params and streaming response

label: hold_detail
translation_notes: Two-column layout (main content + sidebar) → CSS grid or shadcn ResizablePanel; sidebar contains linked records + actions
Held items table → Drizzle query: quality_hold_items JOIN lps; partial release per item → Server Action with item_id + partial qty
Activity log tab (q-timeline) → events from quality_hold_events table; shadcn Timeline or custom ul with dot connectors
Linked records (NCR/source inspection) → FK links with navigation on click; lazy load linked record summary
Release Hold button in sidebar → RBAC guard (quality_lead only); blocked if same user created hold (SoD V-QA-HOLD-006)
SignedBanner for released holds → Alert with immutable record notice; download audit PDF → Server Action generating PDF from record
activeStates_includes helper → DB-level: query WHERE status = ANY(ARRAY['open','investigating','escalated']); do not replicate in UI
Hold context card (reference/product/reason/category/disposition) → all from DB; no local state needed

label: specs_list
translation_notes: Client filter (status/appliesTo/search) → URL searchParams; Drizzle WHERE: status, applies_to, product ILIKE search
expiringSoon highlight → server-side: eff_until < now() + interval '30 days' AND status='active'; pass as boolean prop
isSuperseded opacity and strikethrough → CSS class from prop; version strikethrough = text-decoration-line: line-through
RegTags component → reusable Badge list from spec.regs array; each reg tag is a DB-stored string array column
Approved by / approvedAt two-line cell → JOIN to users table on approved_by_user_id; display name + ISO datetime
params/critical counts → from spec_parameters aggregate: COUNT(*), COUNT(*) FILTER WHERE critical=true
Create Specification button → navigate to spec wizard page (QA-003a); not a modal
View action → navigate to spec detail page (QA-003b)

label: spec_wizard
translation_notes: 3-step wizard (header/params/review) → shadcn Stepper or custom step indicator; step state managed by URL searchParam (step=1/2/3) for back-navigation safety
Header step → useForm for product/specCode/appliesTo/effFrom/effUntil/regs/refDocs/notes; spec_code uniqueness validated async on blur via Server Action
Params step → useFieldArray for dynamic parameter list; add-parameter side panel → form within form; min<=max validation in Zod superRefine
Review step → read-only Summary + parameters table; Submit for approval → Server Action upserts spec with status='draft'; Approve immediately → opens spec_sign_modal
regs Set (toggleReg) → shadcn MultiSelect or ToggleGroup; regs stored as text[] in DB column
FA product allergen profile note (FA prefix check) → server-side allergen snapshot on approval, not on product selection; remove client-side prefix check in production
Stepper completed state → shadcn Step with 'completed' variant; back navigation must preserve form state (use URL state or sessionStorage)
Version auto-set to 'v1' on create → server increments version on clone; client never computes version

label: spec_detail
translation_notes: Two-column layout (main + sidebar) → CSS grid or shadcn two-column page; sidebar shows signature state + regulatory notes
Allergen profile snapshot grid → allergen_grid CSS → shadcn Grid; read from spec_allergen_profile JSON snapshot column; present/absent badge variant
Parameters table → read-only; columns: name/type/target/min/max/unit/method/critical; critical rows highlighted with CSS class
SignedBanner → Alert with lock icon; spec.approved_at + approved_by joined from users table; immutable after approval
Clone to new version button → Server Action: duplicate spec record with version+1 and status='draft'; navigate to new spec wizard edit mode
Approve Specification button (under_review) → opens spec_sign_modal; only visible to quality_lead role
RegTags component → reusable Badge list; regulations stored as text[] in DB
Download PDF → Route Handler generating PDF from spec data (puppeteer/pdf-lib); stream as attachment

label: haccp_plans
translation_notes: haccp-layout (tree + detail) → CSS grid sidebar+main; tree = shadcn NavigationMenu or custom ul with L0/L1 indent levels
Plan tree (HACCP plans + nested CCPs) → server-loaded: SELECT * FROM haccp_plans LEFT JOIN ccps ON plan_id; tree rendered server-side
CCP card (spark dots for readings) → ccp-spark → inline SVG dots or recharts dot series; pass/fail color from within_limits bool
Recent readings count + deviations count → server-side aggregation per CCP: COUNT(*) and COUNT(*) FILTER WHERE !within_limits
Approve Plan (e-sign) → opens esign_modal with meaning='approved'; Server Action: updates haccp_plans.status='active', approved_by, approved_at
Edit CCP / New HACCP Plan buttons → navigate to dedicated edit pages or open modals (not in prototype scope; mark as P2)
Reading timeline sparkline → prototype uses CSS dots; production: recharts LineChart or tiny SVG path with D3 scale
ISO 22000 / Codex HACCP regulation tags → stored per plan in DB regs field; not hardcoded

label: ccp_monitoring
translation_notes: KPI strip (activeCCPs/compliance/deviations) → server aggregation: JOIN ccp_monitoring_records with ccps; compliance = pass_count/total_count for today
allReadings flatMap → Drizzle query: SELECT * FROM ccp_monitoring_records JOIN ccps JOIN haccp_plans ORDER BY recorded_at DESC with date filter
Timeline chart (ccp-chart-area with dots) → recharts ScatterChart or ResponsiveContainer with dots colored by within_limits; critical limit band = ReferenceArea
Chart CCP selector → controls which CCP's readings are charted; server-fetch readings for selected CCP on filter change (SWR or server action)
Date range filter + CCP/plan selects → URL searchParams; server query respects all filters
Deviations 24h KPI → server COUNT WHERE within_limits=false AND recorded_at > now() - interval '24 hours'
Compliance % → server: COUNT FILTER WHERE within_limits=true / COUNT(*) for today; never client-computed
Export CSV → Route Handler with same filter params; includes signature_hash column for audit trail

label: ccp_deviations
translation_notes: QA_DEVIATIONS mock → Drizzle query on ccp_deviation_records table JOIN ccps JOIN ncr_reports; sorted by recorded_at DESC
openCount / actionPending / resolvedToday → server aggregation: COUNT with conditional filters; single query with multiple expressions
Sign off button → opens esign_modal with meaning='witnessed'; Server Action updates deviation.signed_at and signed_by_user_id
Add action button → opens inline edit or small modal with corrective action textarea; Server Action updates corrective_action field
Linked NCR column → FK to ncr_reports.id; display as link navigating to NCR detail; 'Auto-created' badge if ncr.source='auto'
row-major class for missing corrective action → computed server-side: correctiveAction IS NULL; pass as boolean prop
Filter bar (hazard/CCP/severity/status/date) → URL searchParams; Drizzle WHERE with AND chaining; status enum maps to signed_at IS NULL vs IS NOT NULL
HazardBadge component → shadcn Badge with variant based on hazard_type enum (biological=red, chemical=amber, physical=slate, allergen=red)

label: allergen_gates
translation_notes: QA_ALLERGEN_GATES mock → Drizzle query on allergen_changeover_validations table JOIN work_orders (woFrom/woTo) JOIN users (firstSigner/secondSigner)
Right-side drawer (drawer-side) → shadcn Sheet component with side='right'; drawer body shows cleaning checklist + signatures + action buttons
Cleaning checklist in drawer → q-checklist → static ul with tick/cross icons; checklist stored as JSON in gate record, not hardcoded
ATP threshold comparison → atpRlu and atpThreshold from DB; highlight in red if exceeds; never recompute threshold in UI
pending2nd/approvedToday/rejected KPI strip → server aggregation: COUNT GROUP BY status for status IN ('pending_second_sign','approved','rejected')
Allergen delta display (removed/added badge arrays) → stored as text[] in allergens_removed + allergens_added columns; render each as Badge
Sign (2nd) button → RBAC: role=quality_lead AND status='pending_second_sign'; opens allergen_dual_sign_modal
Download evidence PDF → Route Handler generating PDF with cleaning checklist + both signatures + ATP result; BRCGS audit artifact

label: qa_templates
translation_notes: gallery-grid card layout → CSS grid with auto-fill; each card = shadcn Card with category badge, parameter preview, metadata footer
QA_TEMPLATES mock → Drizzle query on inspection_templates table with params count + preview array (first 4 param names)
Category filter pills → URL searchParam; server-side WHERE category = ? filter on inspection_templates
Use in spec button → should navigate to spec wizard with template pre-populated (templateId URL param); not yet implemented in prototype
Edit button → opens template_create_modal with template data as prop
params count + preview → aggregate query: COUNT param rows + array_agg(name) LIMIT 4 from inspection_template_params table
createdBy/updated → JOIN users; format updated timestamp with date-fns or Intl.DateTimeFormat

label: sampling_plans
translation_notes: QA_SAMPLING_PLANS mock → Drizzle query on sampling_plans table; filter by type, status, applies_to via URL searchParams
Filter pills (type/status/applies_to) → shadcn ToggleGroup or pill buttons backed by URL searchParam state
Table columns (lotMin-lotMax, sampleSize, accept, reject) → read-only numeric display; num mono class → font-mono text-right
Edit button → opens inline edit modal or navigates to edit page; 'samplingCreate' modal referenced but not in prototype scope; build as simple crud-form-with-validation modal
ISO 2859-1 / MIL-STD-105E info box → shadcn Alert variant='info'; external link to Wikipedia opens in new tab
Status badge → active/archived enum; StatusBadge shared component → shadcn Badge with variant map
Type badge (iso2859/ansi_z14/custom) → Badge; type stored in DB not hardcoded

label: audit_trail
translation_notes: QA_AUDIT mock → Drizzle query on quality_audit_log table (immutable, insert-only); filter by table, op, user, search, date range via URL searchParams
Expandable rows (expanded Set) → collapsible detail row pattern; use shadcn Collapsible or table row span with transition
audit-diff (before/after JSON) → two-column diff display; old_data / new_data JSONB columns; shadcn ScrollArea for long diffs; syntax highlight with Prism or shiki
SIGN event inline signature detail → read from esignatures table JOIN on record_id; display signature_hash truncated with copy button
Operation filter pills (INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE/SIGN/RELEASE/APPROVE/CLOSE) → Set-based filter → WHERE op = ANY(ARRAY[...params]); empty set = all ops
Table selector → enum of auditable tables; map to actual DB table names for WHERE clause
Export CSV/JSON buttons → Route Handler GET /api/quality/audit/export with same filter params; streams response; export itself is audit-logged
Immutability enforcement → no edit/delete actions on this table; rows have no action column except Expand; BRCGS §3.11.1 7-year retention

label: qa_settings
translation_notes: 5-tab settings page (general/regulations/notifications/retention/rules) → shadcn Tabs backed by URL searchParam; each tab = Server Component with its own data loader
General tab: hold reason duration table → inline editable input per row; bulk save via Server Action (array of {code, defaultDuration}); RBAC: quality_lead only
Regulations tab: checkbox matrix → shadcn Checkbox list; active presets stored in tenant_settings.quality_regulations text[] column
Notifications tab: event × channel matrix → each cell is Checkbox; stored in notification_settings table with (event_key, channel, enabled) rows
Retention tab: read-only display (note in prototype: 'cannot change from UI') → Server Component only; no form; admin contact note
Rules tab: DSL rules read-only table → query from rule_registry table; links to 02-Settings Rule Registry; batch_release_gate_v1 shown with P2 badge + opacity
All settings changes → Server Action with role guard (quality_lead or admin); optimistic UI updates with useTransition
CCP deviation escalation delay (minutes) field → stored in tenant_settings.ccp_escalation_delay_minutes; validated 0-3600 range
